description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted cabinet or shelf unit with a minimalist design, featuring a combination of light wood and white surfaces. The left side of the unit displays a series of open horizontal shelves, likely for storing small items or documents, while the right side is a solid panel, possibly concealing additional storage space. There is a small rectangular cutout on the front, which may serve as a handle or access point for a compartment. The overall structure is compact and flat, making it suitable for urban environments such as offices, hallways, or garages. The materials appear to be primarily wood and laminate, with a smooth, matte finish. The design is functional and modern, with no visible decorative elements or glass panels.
description: A modern, wall-mounted cabinet or shelf with open wooden shelves on one side and a solid white panel on the other, featuring a small rectangular cutout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile and the depth of the open shelves on the left edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open shelves, solid white panel, and the small rectangular cutout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the solid panel with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, flat surface with no visible features.
